overview: A full-stack Free Fire tournament platform where players can register, join matches, submit UPI payments for approval, and track results — with a complete admin panel for managing matches, players, and payouts.
features: User registration and login with Free Fire UID
Match browsing and joining with entry fees
UPI payment submission with QR code and screenshot upload
Admin approval to reveal room ID and password
Match results and leaderboard per tournament
Admin panel: manage users, matches, payments, and results
